title: Harbour Housewares Rounded Floating Glass Bathroom Shelves - 40cm - Clear/Black - 2x Wall-Mounted Kitchen Bedroom Shower Room Décor Caddy Towel Storage Organiser Shelving Rack with Brackets
features: DURABLE TEMPERED GLASS: Crafted from toughened tempered glass, this shelf offers outstanding strength and stability, with high resistance to shock, impact, and temperature or humidity changes, ensuring lasting durability.

IDEAL FOR SMALL SPACES: With a narrow 13cm profile, this shelf is perfect for smaller bathrooms, providing extra storage space without crowding the room. Store your essentials while maintaining a tidy, spacious atmosphere.

CUSTOMISABLE AND STYLISH: Available with three metallic bracket colours, this shelf can be tailored to fit your unique bathroom style. It includes all necessary fixtures and fittings for a seamless installation process.

SLEEK, MODERN AESTHETIC: The minimalist floating glass design complements any bathroom décor, giving you a chic storage solution for toiletries and other essentials while keeping them neatly organised and easily accessible.
PERFECTLY SIZED STORAGE: Measuring 40cm in width, 13cm in height, and just 0.5cm in depth, this shelf offers ample space for your bathroom needs without taking up valuable floor space.
description: Product Description The Harbour Housewares range of Glass Storage Shelves offers a sleek and practical solution for any bathroom, with a selection of shapes and sizes on offer to suit all purposes. Each shelf in this collection has been crafted from tempered glass for the highest levels of strength and durability. The included chrome fixings ensure a secure hold, with a classic shine sure to stand out in any surrounding. A perfect DIY job for beginners and experts alike, each shelf comes with all necessary fixtures and fittings included in the box. Tempered Glass Construction For maximum, long-lasting strength Choice of Metallic Brackets For a sleek contemporary addition to any bathroom Easy to Install Rawlplugs and screws included
